title: Macrostylis dubia
taxonomy: Macrostylis dubia is a species of isopod crustacean, which belongs to the family Macrostylidae. The order to which Macrostylis dubia belongs is Isopoda. The class that encompasses isopods is Malacostraca, a group of crustaceans with seven pairs of walking legs. Isopods, including Macrostylis dubia, also fall under the subphylum Crustacea and the phylum Arthropoda. Further classification includes the kingdom Animalia, which is a group of multicellular, eukaryotic organisms.
